member.name: T:Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.IDialect
member.summary: Provides database-specific syntax translation.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.IDialect.QuoteIdentifier(System.String)
member.summary: Quotes an identifier, e.g., columnname -> [columnname] for SQL Server or "columnname" for PG.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.IDialect.BuildPagination(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Generates the pagination syntax.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.IDialect.BuildTableName(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates proper table name reference for NAV Company handling and schema scopes.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.IDialect.FormatParameterName(System.String)
member.summary: Formats the parameter name. e.g. @p0

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope.StreamRawAsync``1(System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute raw SQL and return results as an async stream.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope.RawQueryToArrayAsync``1(System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute raw SQL and return all results as an array.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope.GetQualifiedTableName(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resolve a NAV table name to the qualified SQL identifier (schema and company prefix).

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.IParameterPreprocessor
member.summary: Optional: transform parameters before the command is created so params are created with correct types from the start.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.IMultipleQuery.AddRaw``1(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Add a raw SQL statement to the batch. Dapper maps results to T.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Configuration.TenantConfiguration.CommandTimeout
member.summary: Command timeout in seconds. Default 30. Use 0 for no timeout.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Configuration.TenantConfiguration.EnableRetry
member.summary: Enable retry for transient failures. Default false.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Configuration.TenantConfiguration.RetryCount
member.summary: Number of retry attempts when EnableRetry is true. Default 3.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Configuration.TenantConfiguration.RetryDelayMilliseconds
member.summary: Delay in milliseconds between retries. Default 500.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.SqlLogCategories
member.summary: Category used for query logging. Set LogLevel to Debug (or Information) to log SQL and parameters.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Materialization.Materializer.SafeToByteArray(System.Object)
member.summary: Safe conversion from reader value to byte[]. Avoids InvalidCastException when the column is returned as Int32 or other type (e.g. wrong ordinal).

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Materialization.Materializer.NormalizeColumnName(System.String)
member.summary: Strip table alias from reader column name so "t5.[Role ID]" or "t5.Role ID" matches "Role ID".

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Materialization.Materializer.TryGetGeneratedMapper``1
member.summary: Tries to use the source-generated *Mapper.Parse(reader) for [NavTable] types. One-time reflection per T, then cached.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Metadata.EntityMetadata`1
member.summary: Pre-caches reflection metadata per entity type to ensure zero-alloc and AOT-safe executions.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Metadata.EntityMetadataResolvers
member.summary: Non-generic resolver for dynamic types.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Query.RawQueryEntry
member.summary: Represents a raw SQL query entry for the batch.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Query.MultipleQuery.ReadResultSetAsync``1(System.Data.Common.DbDataReader,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads the current result set using the Materializer so [NavColumn] (e.g. No_) maps correctly to properties (e.g. No).

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Query.MultipleQuery.MergeQueries(System.Text.StringBuilder,Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Query.ParameterContext)
member.summary: Builds each query with a shared ParameterContext and per-query prefix so parameter names are unique without string replacement.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Query.ParameterEvaluator
member.summary: Fast evaluation of Expression trees without calling slow Expression.Compile(). Handles common patterns like constants, closure variables, and simple properties.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Query.SqlBuilder.ExtractColumnWithTargetName(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Type,System.String})
member.summary: Emit a select part, aliasing as targetMemberName when it differs from the source column so the materializer binds correctly (e.g. t1.[Name] AS [CustomerName]).

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Query.SqlBuilder.IsReadOnlySqlColumn(System.String)
member.summary: SQL Server timestamp/rowversion columns are read-only and must be excluded from UPDATE SET.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.Query.ParameterContext.PushPrefix(System.String)
member.summary: Use a prefix for parameter names (e.g. "q0" -> @q0_p0, @q0_p1). Use with PushPrefix/PopPrefix for multi-query batches.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.ParallelQueryScope
member.summary: Manages concurrent query execution across multiple TenantScope instances. Each parallel task gets its own DB connection for true parallelism. Bounded by a semaphore to prevent connection pool exhaustion.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.ParallelQueryScope.RunAsync``1(System.Func{Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a query on a dedicated scope (its own connection).

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.ParallelQueryScope.RunAsync(System.Func{Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a void operation on a dedicated scope.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.ParallelQueryScope.RunAllAsync``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Func{Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute multiple operations in parallel, each on its own scope. Returns all results.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Core.ParallelQueryScope.RunAsync``2(System.Func{Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Func{Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``1}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute two independent operations in parallel, return both results.
Execute three independent operations in parallel, return all results.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Dialects.NavDialect.NavBulkExtensions.ModifyRangeAsync``1(Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk updates instances via a native single RPC network jump using raw ADO.NET internals for massive speed.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Dialects.NavDialect.NavCompanyExtensions.NavCompany(Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.IDataverse,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reroutes table compilation strictly to a specified NAV Company syntax (e.g., [CRONUS$Customer]).

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.Dialects.NavDialect.NavMetadataExtensions.GetNavTablesAsync(Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of NAV tables currently recognized within the bound tenant SQL schema.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.GraphQL.NavQueryExtensions.AsQueryable``1(Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.IQuery{``0},Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.ITenantScope)
member.summary: Converts IQuery to IQueryable so that GraphQL (HotChocolate) filtering, sorting, and paging are translated to SQL and executed in a single round-trip.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Sql.GraphQL.TyresolesQueryable`1
member.summary: IQueryable implementation that wraps Tyresoles.Sql IQuery and translates LINQ to SQL at execution.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.GraphQL.TyresolesQueryable`1.Execute
member.summary: Builds and executes the query, returning the result array (synchronous; blocks on async).

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Sql.GraphQL.TyresolesQueryProvider
member.summary: IQueryProvider that translates LINQ expression trees into Tyresoles.Sql IQuery and executes them.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.GraphQL.QueryExtensions.SelectSameTypeHelper``1(Tyresoles.Sql.Abstractions.IQuery{``0},System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,``0}})
member.summary: Bridges HotChocolate's Select<T,T> projection into IQuery<T>.Select<T>, so SqlBuilder emits only the requested columns instead of SELECT *.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.SqlServer.Extensions.AddTyresolesSql(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers Tyresoles.Sql services with SQL Server. Call Configure<DataverseOptions> or bind from config first. If the host registers an ILoggerFactory (e.g. AddTyresolesLogger), query logging will be available at Debug level.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Sql.SqlServer.Extensions.AddTyresolesSql(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers Tyresoles.Sql with configuration bound from the "Tyresoles" or "tenants" section.
